macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Stocks Hit New Highs Led by Tech; S&P 500 Rises While Dow Dips Slightly
items.summary: Last week, stocks pushed to new highs with tech leading the gains; the Dow Jones fell 0.16% to 49,230, while the S&P 500 rose amid firm risk appetite.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Liquidations Reach $105 Million in Past 24 Hours
items.summary: Total network liquidations hit $105 million, with long positions at $56.98 million and shorts at $47.71 million; Bitcoin longs liquidated $5.51 million, shorts $11.57 million, Ethereum longs $4.48 million, shorts $7.69 million. Largest single liquidation was $1.14 million BTCUSDT on Bybit.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Steadily Around $78,000 Amid Trump CLARITY Act Push
items.summary: BTC held between $77,140 and $78,210 over the past 24 hours, currently at $78,010 up 0.54%, as Trump promotes the CLARITY Act despite bank opposition.

items.title: Bitcoin Consolidates Near $74,500 After $78,000 Peak
items.summary: Bitcoin hit a 10-week high near $78,000 but now consolidates around $74,500 amid Hormuz tensions; other prices include Ethereum at ₹2,17,880 (-0.24%) and notable movers like Siren up 10.89%.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation Unstakes Nearly $50 Million ETH Amid ETF Inflows
items.summary: Ethereum Foundation unstaked about $49 million ETH (wstETH via Lido) as it nears 70,000 ETH staking target, while US spot ETH ETFs saw a 10-day inflow streak. ETH trades near $2,300-$2,334 with bearish retail sentiment.

items.title: Suspected Insider Trading Address Opens $5.16 Million LDO Long Position
items.summary: A wallet previously profiting $2.27 million on APE opened a 5x leverage long on 5.57 million LDO worth ~$5.16 million, flagged by Lookonchain.

items.title: Pepeto DeFi Project Raises Over $9.5 Million
items.summary: Pepeto surpassed $9,575,434 in funding, highlighting strong investor interest in the DeFi project amid Bitcoin price predictions of $300,000-$500,000.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Tesla Unveils Upgraded Optimus 'Ultra' Robot with Advanced AI and Physical Capabilities
items.summary: Elon Musk's Tesla has released an upgraded Optimus robot called 'Ultra,' focusing on enhanced intelligence, faster learning, precise motor control, and natural movement by integrating Autopilot neural networks. Insiders report accelerated rollout plans amid shifting perceptions of home robots.

items.title: No Major New AI Model Releases Reported in Last 24 Hours
items.summary: LLM Stats tracker shows the most recent OpenAI models, GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro, released on April 23, with no new large language model updates or benchmark releases in the past day from major labs like OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google.

items.title: Debate Intensifies on AI's Impact on Open Source Security Amid License Changes
items.summary: Cal.com abandons AGPL licensing for its commercial codebase, sparking concerns in open source community; discussions highlight AI tools like OpenAI's GPT 5.4-Cyber for vulnerability detection and reverse engineering, balanced against patching capabilities.

items.title: DraftMarks: New Open-Source Tool Reveals AI's Role in Student Writing Process
items.summary: Georgia Tech and Stanford researchers launch DraftMarks, an open-source tool that visualizes AI interactions in student drafts, tracking edits and prompts in real-time to show human-AI collaboration and effort.

items.title: Karpathy's Overnight GPU Test: AI Agent Uncovers Long-Overlooked Bug
items.summary: Andrej Karpathy reports an AI agent, left running overnight on a GPU, discovered a bug missed by humans for months, demonstrating potential for accelerated research through engineered AI agents.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Revealed
items.summary: Ubisoft has revealed the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake, described as looking glorious, with more remakes in development. Additional news includes Xbox Game Pass price changes, Diablo 4 updates, and Ubisoft canceling a AAA game.
items.source: YouTube - Biggest Gaming News & Leaks Of The Week

items.title: Tropico 7 Gameplay Revealed
items.summary: Tropico 7 has been announced with initial gameplay footage shown off.

items.title: Clash of Clans April Update Adds New Content
items.summary: The upcoming Clash of Clans update introduces the Sky Wagon siege machine, Logger guardian, and Electro Fangs equipment.
items.source: YouTube - New Sky Wagon, Logger, and Electro Fangs in Clash of Clans

items.title: California Video Game Developer Arrested in White House Dinner Shooting
items.summary: A video game developer from California has been arrested in connection with a shooting at a White House dinner.

items.title: Team Secret vs Nongshim RedForce in VCT 2026 Pacific Stage 1
items.summary: Team Secret faced Nongshim RedForce in a match during VCT 2026 Pacific Stage 1 Week 4.
items.source: YouTube - Team Secret vs Nongshim RedForce

items.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X Definitive Edition Reviewed After 200 Hours on Switch 2
items.summary: A reviewer shares thoughts on Xenoblade Chronicles X Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch 2 after over 200 hours, calling it one of the best games of all time.
items.source: YouTube - Xenoblade Chronicles X Switch 2 Review

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Trump Terminates All 22 Members of National Science Board
items.summary: President Trump dismissed all current members of the National Science Board, the independent advisory body that guides the National Science Foundation. The White House has not provided reasons for the dismissals or information on replacements.

items.title: Citizen Lab Uncovers Two Spying Campaigns Exploiting Telecom Infrastructure
items.summary: Security researchers discovered two separate spying campaigns abusing weaknesses in SS7 and Diameter protocols across 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to track people's locations.

items.title: Samsung Mobile Division Faces First-Ever Annual Loss Amid Component Shortages
items.summary: Samsung co-CEO TM Roh informed company leaders that the mobile division could report its first annual loss this year due to RAM and storage shortages as AI demand consumes market output.

items.title: Microsoft Rolls Out Windows Update to Reduce Forced Restarts
items.summary: Microsoft released a Windows update designed to reduce forced restarts and extend pause limits for users.

items.title: FCC Router Ban Expands to Include Portable Hotspots
items.summary: The FCC's router ban has been expanded to cover portable hotspots, though phones with built-in hotspot features remain excluded from the restrictions.
